s1.ptxt: With the lock releasing part (1) depressed, turn the solenoid connector (harness side) (2) in arrow direction as shown in figure.

attention3.ptxt: Install the solenoid connector (harness side) (1) by aligning the alignment marks (2) and (3) so that they are not half-engaged as shown in figure.

s1.ptxt: Align the groove (1) of the solenoid connector (CVT side) to the slit (2) of the solenoid connector (harness side), then insert the solenoid connector (3) (harness side).
Install the solenoid connector (harness side) (1) by turning it clockwise until it clicks (locks).

attention3.ptxt: When they are locked securely, the position of the alignment marks (2) and (3) will be as shown in figure.
